image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Misfolded proteins that can make more misfolded proteins.
Context visual: These proteins, called prions, are rare but can lead to serious diseases.
Escalation visual: They cause neurodegeneration, impacting the brain’s function.
Evidence visual: Infections can occur through contaminated food or surgical instruments.
Payoff visual: But don’t panic—research is ongoing, and many cases are preventable.
Cta visual: Stay informed about prions and share this video to spread awareness!
